trends.topic: FinTradeBench: A Financial Reasoning Benchmark for LLMs
trends.summary: Real-world financial decision-making is a challenging problem that requires reasoning over heterogeneous signals, including company fundamentals derived from regulatory filings and trading signals computed from price dynamics. Recently, with the advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), financial [金融意思決定のためのLLMベンチマークは、スモールビジネスの投資判断自動化、金融レポート自動生成、取引戦略の自動化に直接応用可能]

trends.topic: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
trends.summary: We introduce Nemotron-Cascade 2, an open 30B MoE model with 3B activated parameters that delivers best-in-class reasoning and strong agentic capabilities. Despite its compact size, its mathematical and coding reasoning performance approaches that of frontier open models. It is the second open-weight [30B MoEモデルの効率的な推論能力は、限られたリソースのスモールビジネスでの文書作成、顧客対応、業務プロセス自動化に適用可能]

trends.topic: Box Maze: A Process-Control Architecture for Reliable LLM Reasoning
trends.summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong generative capabilities but remain vulnerable to hallucination and unreliable reasoning under adversarial prompting. Existing safety approaches -- such as reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and output filtering -- primarily operate at th [信頼性の高いLLM推論アーキテクチャは、スモールビジネスの自動化システムにおける誤情報生成リスク軽減とコンテンツ品質向上に重要]

trends.topic: DyMoE: Dynamic Expert Orchestration with Mixed-Precision Quantization for Efficient MoE Inference on Edge
trends.summary: Despite the computational efficiency of MoE models, the excessive memory footprint and I/O overhead inherent in multi-expert architectures pose formidable challenges for real-time inference on resource-constrained edge platforms. While existing static methods struggle with a rigid latency-accuracy t [エッジデバイスでの効率的なMoE推論は、スモールビジネスが高性能AIを低コストで導入し、リアルタイム自動化を実現するために重要]

Denoising diffusion models are widely used for high-quality image and video generation. Their performance depends on noise schedules, which define the distribution of noise levels applied during training and the sequence of noise levels traversed during sampling. Noise schedules are typically handcr [拡散モデルの性能向上は、スモールビジネスの画像・動画コンテンツ制作の品質向上と制作時間短縮による自動化促進に貢献]
